summary: Frontend-only validation of iteration 6 (full-viewport rows + framer-motion Reveal animations). All acceptance criteria pass on preview URL https://method-positioning.preview.emergentagent.com. DESKTOP 1440x900: Home has all 5 rows (home-hero, home-opening, home-the-model, home-who, home-cta) each measuring exactly 900px tall (=100vh, >=895 threshold). Hero wordmark opacity chain resolves to 1 after 1.5s (framer-motion whileInView completes on load). Scroll-in to home-the-model → eyebrow opacity chain = 1 (staggered reveal works). Regression testids present: global-nav, global-footer, footer-wordmark, footer-linkedin-link, home-hero-wordmark, home-cta-email. Work index: work-index-page + exactly 2 work-cards (work-card-manufacturing-performance, work-card-medtech); opener section height=900 (row-full), 2nd section=1513, 3rd=1326 (row-full-loose accommodates long content without cropping). About: 5 sections rendered, all testids (about-page, about-philosophy, about-founder, about-writing-link) present. Writing: writing-index-page + exactly 8 writing-cards. Connect: connect-headline, connect-email-primary (mailto:connect@methodmarketinggroup.com...), and NEW connect-link-linkedin with href=https://www.linkedin.com/company/method-strategic-marketing/, target=_blank, rel='noopener noreferrer' — all verified. Detail regression: work-detail-manufacturing-performance renders with work-detail-save-pdf + work-detail-outcome + scope-list; writing-detail-inside-out renders with writing-detail-save-pdf. MOBILE 390x844: no horizontal overflow on any of /, /writing, /about, /connect (innerWidth==scrollWidth==390). Every home row-full section measures >= 712.4 (85svh - 5) — hero=717.4, opening=742.2, model=811.1, who=1028.7 (long-content flows past viewport via row-full-loose as intended), cta=717.4. Hamburger nav button present. REDUCED MOTION: new Playwright context with reducedMotion='reduce' loaded / — hero wordmark opacity chain immediately = 1 with no motion wrapper (Reveal/RevealStagger/RevealItem short-circuit correctly via useReducedMotion). CONSOLE ERRORS: 0 across all pages tested at both viewports. PRODUCTION BUILD: `cd /app/frontend && CI=false DISABLE_ESLINT_PLUGIN=true GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false yarn build` → exit 0, 'Compiled successfully.', 15.75s; build/index.html=5657B; build/_redirects='/* /index.html 200' present. Local `npx serve -s build -l 5056` SPA smoke: all 7 routes (/, /work, /about, /writing, /connect, /work/manufacturing-performance, /writing/inside-out) → HTTP 200, identical 5657B payload confirming SPA fallback.

iteration6_acceptance_matrix.row-full-loose_no_crop: PASS — Work sections 2/3 = 1513/1326 (allowed >100vh); home-who mobile 1028.7 (allowed to exceed viewport)
iteration6_acceptance_matrix.reveal_animation_on_scroll: PASS — home-the-model eyebrow opacity->1 after scrollIntoView + 1.5s
iteration6_acceptance_matrix.prefers-reduced-motion: PASS — with reducedMotion=reduce, opacity immediately 1, no motion wrapper (verified via context option)
iteration6_acceptance_matrix.all_existing_testids: PASS — global-nav, global-footer, footer-wordmark, footer-linkedin-link, home-hero-wordmark, home-cta-email, work-index-page (2 cards), work-card-manufacturing-performance, work-card-medtech, work-detail-manufacturing-performance (+ save-pdf, outcome, scope-list), writing-index-page (8 posts), writing-detail-inside-out (+ save-pdf), about-page/philosophy/founder/writing-link, connect-email-primary (mailto)
iteration6_acceptance_matrix.spa_route_serve: PASS — 7/7 routes return 200 with identical 5657B index.html

critical_code_review_comments: Reveal.jsx correctly guards animation via useReducedMotion and returns bare <Tag> — solid.
index.css .row-full uses svh with vh fallback via @supports — correct approach for mobile browser chrome jitter.
.row-full-loose on mobile switches to align-items:flex-start and min-height:auto (max-width:767px) — intentional and correct for long editorial content.

Minor: RevealStagger/RevealItem re-check useReducedMotion in both components; parent RevealStagger returning plain div means RevealItem's motion variants are still evaluated by RevealItem but without a parent staggerChildren orchestrator; the individual RevealItem's `whileInView` is not set so items would remain hidden. HOWEVER since RevealItem ALSO short-circuits when reduce is true, this happens to work correctly. This coupling is subtle — worth a comment or unit test for future safety, but not a bug today (verified with Playwright reducedMotion=reduce).
WorkDetail and WritingDetail intentionally NOT converted — correct choice, editorial long-form pages should not force full-viewport rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 (full-viewport rows + framer-motion Reveal) is fully validated end-to-end on preview URL AND local production build. All 12 acceptance criteria pass. Zero console errors. Zero horizontal overflow. Reduced-motion respected. Production build (yarn build) + `serve -s build` SPA fallback both work. Detail pages intentionally excluded from row-full treatment — this is by design, do not flag. If a future iteration touches Reveal.jsx, note the subtle useReducedMotion coupling described in critical_code_review_comments — RevealStagger returning plain <div> in reduce mode relies on RevealItem also short-circuiting; a broken change to one without the other would leave items invisible.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found; feature-addition iteration validated clean.
